title: palicourea perquadrangularis
intro: Palicourea perquadrangularis, also known as the Quadrangular Palicourea, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Palicourea perquadrangularis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Palicourea perquadrangularis include infusions and decoctions made from its leaves, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments.
